Package de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl

Class ApplyStrategy

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl.AbstractProverCore
de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl.ApplyStrategy
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProverCore
public class ApplyStrategy extends AbstractProverCore
Applies rules in an automated fashion. The caller should ensure that the strategy runs in its own thread Uses code by Hans Muller and Kathy Walrath

  • Method Details

    • start

      public ApplyStrategyInfo start(Proof proof, Goal goal)
      Description copied from interface: ProverCore
      starts a proof search for a given goals using the given strategy settings instead the ones configures in the proof
      Parameters:
      proof - the Proof instance
      goal - the goal to prove
      Returns:
      an information object about the performed work (e.g. number of rules applied)

    • start

      public ApplyStrategyInfo start(Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals)
      Description copied from interface: ProverCore
      starts a proof search for a set of goals using the given strategy settings instead the ones configures in the proof
      Parameters:
      proof - the Proof instance
      goals - list of goals to prove
      Returns:
      an information object about the performed work (e.g. number of rules applied)

    • start

      public ApplyStrategyInfo start(Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals, StrategySettings stratSet)
      Description copied from interface: ProverCore
      starts a proof search for a set of goals using the given strategy settings instead the ones configures in the proof
      Parameters:
      proof - the Proof instance
      goals - list of goals to prove
      stratSet - the strategy settings to use
      Returns:
      an information object about the performed work (e.g. number of rules applied)

    • start

      public ApplyStrategyInfo start(Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals, int maxSteps, long timeout, boolean stopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal)
      Description copied from interface: ProverCore
      This entry point to the proof may provide inconsistent data. The properties within the proof may differ to the explicit data. This is discouraged. starts a proof search for a set of goals
      Parameters:
      proof - the Proof instance
      goals - list of goals to prove
      maxSteps - an int with the maximal number of rule applications to be performed
      timeout - a long with a timeout when tyo stop the proof search at latest
      stopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal - true if the prover shall stop at the first encountered non-closable goal
      Returns:
      an information object about the performed work (e.g. number of rules applied)

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Description copied from interface: ProverCore
      Used by, e.g., InteractiveProver.clear() in order to prevent memory leaking. When a proof obligation is abandoned all references to the proof must be reset.

    • hasBeenInterrupted

      public boolean hasBeenInterrupted()
      Description copied from interface: ProverCore
      Returns true iff the last run has been stopped due to a received InterruptedException. This exception would have been swallowed by the system. However, the cancelled flag is set in this case which allows detection of such a condition.
      Returns:
      whether the last run has been interrupted
